sources.title: FUKUSHIMA & NUTTY NUCLEAR CONSPIRACY THEORIES
Skeptoid: More Fukushima Scaremongering Debunked

evidence_against.text: Multiple fact-checkers and scientists have debunked Fukushima conspiracy narratives; the disaster resulted from the 2011 tsunami disabling cooling systems, not an intentional event.

sources.title: UFO sightings linked with nuclear weapons testing, US study claims

evidence_for.text: A US study found transient aerial phenomena were 45% more likely to be observed within a day of a nuclear weapons test, suggesting an unexplained statistical correlation.

sources.title: Why some people think the lottery was invented for time travelers
Proxy Wars - How Major Powers Fight Without Direct Conflict
In Pursuit of a General Theory of Proxy Warfare

evidence_against.text: Proxy warfare is the predominant form of modern conflict; major powers continue to wage war through intermediaries, showing warfare has evolved rather than become obsolete.

evidence_for.text: Nick Bostrom's 2011 infohazard framework identifies belief hazards - true or false information that causes harm through psychological effects - as a formally recognised class.

sources.title: Self-fulfilling prophecy - Wikipedia
Cognitohazards pt 1 - An Introduction to Infohazards

evidence_for.text: Self-fulfilling prophecy is a well-documented psychological phenomenon: a false expectation causes behaviour that makes the expectation come true, matching the core claim that prophecies shape reality through belief.

sources.title: Fact or Fiction: Is There a Secret Base on the Dark Side of the Moon?

evidence_against.text: China's Chang'e-4 mission landed on the lunar far side in 2019 and found no evidence of artificial structures, alien bases, or monitoring equipment.

sources.title: What Is Project Blue Beam? Conspiracy Theory Over Drones
Project Blue Beam: The 1990s Conspiracy Theory That Told of Hologram Alien Invasions
What Is Operation Blue Beam? Origins, Stages, and Claims

evidence_against.text: Projecting convincing sky-wide holograms globally is beyond current or near-future technology; no credible documentation or whistleblower testimony has ever supported Project Blue Beam's existence.

Bugsy movie review & film summary - Roger Ebert

evidence_for.text: Critics noted the film presents an idealized, glamorous portrayal of mobster Bugsy Siegel and Las Vegas's founding, which some argue romanticises the city's criminal origins.

Mass Media Mind Control

The Time Cube | Know Your Meme
Gene Ray - RationalWiki

evidence_against.text: Gene Ray's original Time Cube (1997) posited four simultaneous days per Earth rotation - a pseudoscientific claim with no mathematical support; the iceberg version adapts the name for a distinct four-universe theory.

sources.title: Technocracy movement - Wikipedia
Technocracy, Fear-Mongers, and the Conspiracy

evidence_for.text: Technocracy as a political concept has a documented movement history from the 1930s; contemporary academics raise concerns about algorithmic governance reducing meaningful human decision-making.

sources.title: Telecommunications and the occult | National Science and Media Museum
Technology and the Demonic

evidence_for.text: Historically, early telegraph lines were popularly associated with spiritualism and the occult; physicist Sir Oliver Lodge was simultaneously a wireless pioneer and president of the London Society for Psychical Research.

sources.title: Wetiko: the Virus of Selfishness According to Native Americans
Seeing Wetiko: On Capitalism, Mind Viruses, and Antidotes for a World in Transition
Dispelling Wetiko: Breaking the Curse of Evil

evidence_for.text: Wetiko (cognate Windigo) is a documented concept in Algonquin traditions describing a psychospiritual condition of destructive selfishness; indigenous author Jack Forbes examined it in Columbus and Other Cannibals.

sources.title: Tulpa - Wikipedia
Tulpas, Ghost Hunting & The Paranormal Phenomenon Of Thought-Created Beings
Study Offers New Insights into Extraterrestrial Origins of Earth's Water
Scientists find evidence that overturns theories of the origin of water on Earth
Extraterrestrial liquid water - Wikipedia

evidence_for.text: Multiple peer-reviewed studies support the hypothesis that Earth's water arrived via outer-solar-system asteroid/comet bombardment; grain analysis from asteroid Itokawa supports extraterrestrial water delivery.
Oxford University research (April 2025) found Earth's primordial material was richer in hydrogen than previously believed, reinforcing that water has non-local origins.

evidence_for.text: Gerrymandering - manipulating district boundaries to favour specific electoral outcomes - is a thoroughly documented, real political practice employed by both major US parties.

sources.title: Gerrymandering Explained | Brennan Center for Justice

evidence_against.text: Redistricting is a studied, partisan political practice; there is no evidence it is deployed as a centralised government scheme to manage population through forced migration.

sources.title: Italian Languages and DNA Shaping Techniques: A Journey into Linguistic Genetics

evidence_against.text: Scientific research shows genes and language are transmitted through separate pathways; Italian-speaking populations show no unique genetic markers attributable to language use.

The True Story Behind The Holy Grail
10 Fascinating Holy Grail Theories That Will Leave You Intrigued

evidence_against.text: Medieval historian Carlos de Ayala states the Grail legend is a 12th-century literary invention with no historical basis; no excavation has produced credible physical evidence of the Grail.

sources.title: Opposition to the Use of Hormone Growth Promoters in Beef and Dairy Cattle Production - APHA
Recombinant Bovine Growth Hormone | American Cancer Society
Bovine somatotropin - Wikipedia

evidence_for.text: The American Public Health Association formally opposes hormone growth promoters in cattle, citing concerns over elevated IGF-1 levels linked to cancer risk and increased antibiotic-resistant bacteria.

evidence_against.text: The FDA, WHO, and NIH have independently concluded that meat and dairy from rBST-treated cows is safe for human consumption; evidence for significant population harm is not conclusive.
